name: OFM IG DM Agent V1 — TEMPLATE
_note: Working copy adapted from source_joe_auramax_workflow.json. Per-creator deployment: clone this workflow, replace ALL <PLACEHOLDER> values, set credentials, then activate. The system prompt body is in system_prompt_v1.md (paste into AI Agent node's systemMessage). The formatter prompt is in formatter_prompt_v1.md (paste into Message a model node's role:system content).
_per_creator_replacements_required: <CREATOR_HANDLE> - creator's IG handle (e.g. bella_pilot), used in webhook path + session key + workflow name
<CREATOR_NAME> - creator's first name (e.g. Bella), used in system prompt
<KNOWLEDGE_BASE_DOC_URL> - Google Doc URL for this creator's knowledge base
<MANYCHAT_BEARER_CRED_ID> - n8n credential ID for ManyChat bearer auth (per-creator ManyChat app)
<MANYCHAT_SEND_FLOW_NS> - ManyChat flow namespace for the message-send flow
<MODEL_CRED_ID> - n8n credential ID for the LLM provider (OpenAI or Anthropic)
<GOOGLE_DOCS_CRED_ID> - n8n credential ID for Google Docs OAuth (one per agency, reused across creators)
_model_choice_note: Default uses OpenAI gpt-5.4 (Joe's pattern). For better empathetic / conversational quality on OFM use case, swap node type from @n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain.lmChatOpenAi to @n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain.lmChatAnthropic with model claude-sonnet-4-6. The langchain agent node abstracts the model so the swap is purely a node-replacement, no other rewiring required.

parameters.text:
={{ $json.body.custom_fields['AI > User Messages'] }}

Previous conversation context: {{ $json.body.custom_fields['conversation_summary'] ?? 'New conversation' }}

parameters.toolDescription:
WHEN TO FIRE: ONCE, at the end of Phase 0 - only after the fan has confirmed BOTH 18+ AND their country. Do not fire early, do not fire twice.

Fields saved to ManyChat:
- country (text)
- age (number, 18+ only)
- qualified (true/false) - true if age >=18 and not in a country where OF is illegal; false otherwise

IMMEDIATELY after firing this, also call apply_tag in the same turn:
- If qualified=false (under 18): apply Disqualified_Lead
- Otherwise no qualifying tag needed (proceed to Phase 1)

WHEN TO FIRE: ONCE, at the end of Phase 2, right before transitioning to Phase 3. Hold all 5 values in memory throughout Phase 2 and push them together.

Fields saved to ManyChat:
- vibe (text) - overall energy/personality the fan is showing (e.g. lonely-trucker, chatty-flirt, quiet-collector, just-curious)
- interests (text) - what content style appeals (e.g. her chill personality, photoshoot aesthetic, spicy stuff)
- why_followed (text) - how they found her and what brought them to DMs
- urgency_to_sub (High/Medium/Low) - how likely to convert in this session
- mention_of_other_creators (text or empty) - if they mention subbing to other creators previously, capture it

WHEN TO FIRE: ONCE, in Phase 5, only after the fan explicitly confirms they subscribed. Do NOT fire on intent ("I'll sub later"); only on confirmation ("done", "subbed", "just signed up").

Fields saved to ManyChat:
- subbed (true/false)
- sub_tier (text) - what they bought (e.g. "monthly $15", "yearly $99")
- subbed_timestamp (ISO datetime string)

IMMEDIATELY after firing this, also call apply_tag with tag_name=Subscribed, then send the welcome+handoff message and stop responding (the on-platform chatter team takes over).

WHEN TO FIRE:
1. Every time you transition from one phase to the next (Phase 0->1, 1->2, 2->3, 3->4, 4->5).
2. Mid-phase during Phases 2-4 to update the running summary.

Fields saved to ManyChat:
- current_phase (number 0-5) - the phase you are NOW entering
- conversation_summary (text, under 200 words) - everything known: age, country, vibe, interests, why_followed, objections raised, phase reached. Overwrite with most complete version.

WHEN TO FIRE: when a milestone is reached. Use ONLY these exact tag values:

- Trust_Asset_Sent: Fire when a teaser asset is referenced (Phase 3)
- OF_Link_Pitched: Fire the moment the OF subscribe link goes out (Phase 4)
- Subscribed: Fire when the fan confirms they subscribed (Phase 5) - this stops further messages
- AI_Detection_Triggered: Fire if fan asks one of the 5 disclosure-trigger phrases
- Disqualified_Lead: Fire if confirmed under 18 OR aggressive hostility / scam behavior
- Human_Alert_Check_Prospect: Fire on mental health concern, threats, anything outside Bella's scope

May fire multiple times in a conversation, once per milestone. Never fire speculatively.

parameters.name: =tag_name
parameters.value: ={{ $fromAI('tagName', `One of: Trust_Asset_Sent, OF_Link_Pitched, Subscribed, AI_Detection_Triggered, Disqualified_Lead, Human_Alert_Check_Prospect`, 'string') }}
